title: React Developer Tools Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the Components tab, live state/prop editing, and the Profiler.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily purpose of React Developer Tools?
options: To inspect the React component tree and the current state and props of any component in real-time.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which tab in React DevTools shows the entire component tree structure of your application?
Can you use React DevTools to edit a component's props and state in the browser from the UI?
options: Yes, you can edit them directly in the Components tab to see immediate UI updates.
No, you can only view them.
Yes, but it only changes the color.

questions.question: Which tab in React DevTools allows you to record an interaction and see how long each component took to render?
React DevTools is built directly into all browsers and doesn't require an extension installation.
options: False (it must be installed as a browser extension)
